name: Mr. Jones: Retribution
short_description: When his family was taken from him, Paul Jones stopped seeking Justice and found only Retribution. In this dark, cinematic action-shooter, embark on a brutal Revenge journey against three corrupt crime families of a Neo-Noir city, armed with your M4A1 rifle.
detailed_description:
PAUL JONES: THE RETRUBITION

Paul Jones was just a family man. Until the three major crime families of the city took something from him that could never be returned. Now, there is no Paul Jones, there is only Mr. Jones, seeking bloody vengeance. Immerse yourself in this Third-Person Shooter experience, where Action, Adventure, and Neo-Noir atmosphere collide. Every bullet is a promise, and every shadow is a refuge.

  • Cinematic Action Combat: High-octane, stylized Action Shooter mechanics. Use the power of your M4A1 rifle and limited ammo to hunt down your foes. Every encounter is designed to feel like a Cinematic scene.

  • Dark Neo-Noir Narrative: A Story Rich scenario set in a rain-soaked, neon-lit, corrupt city, filled with Revenge and moral dilemmas. Experience a gritty, mature storyline.

  • Stealth and Tactics: Sometimes the best bullet is the one you never fire. Utilize Stealth mechanics to bypass enemy lines or choose to unleash hell. Tactical positioning is key to survival.

  • Hardcore Experience: Simple yet satisfying gameplay that tests the player's reflexes and resolve. Feel the weight of every bullet.

  • High Value, Low Price: Start this action-packed Indie adventure immediately at a 0.99$ price point and witness Paul Jones' quest for vengeance.

The city will bleed for Paul Jones' family. Join Mr. Jones on this ruthless journey of Retribution. Add to your Wishlist today and secure your chance to experience.
